assertions.title: Channel tools with simplified state machine

evidence.testResults: All channel tests: PASS (8 tests), State canonical tests: PASS (3 tests with 12 subtests)

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Email notifications correctly route through DigestCollector for routine events and bypass digest for escalations. Digest produces meaningful content and flushes hourly. Channel tools and simplified state machine (checking → in_progress) work correctly together.
